subcodes.first_line: O 'Alí-Qablí-Akbar! Render thanks unto the Lord of Power, Who hath confirmed thee and granted thee from the outpourings of the Ocean [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا علی قبل اکبر شکر کن مالک قدر را که ترا تائید فرمود و از فیوضات بحر
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @Qur'an and Hadith quotation and interpretation, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @knowledge; recognition of God, @thankfulness; gratitude
